title: narcissus romieuxii var. albidus
intro: Narcissus romieuxii var. albidus is a rare, white-flowering variant of the Narcissus romieuxii plant, a species of flowering bulbous plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Narcissus romieuxii var. albidus are said to include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as immune system support, although these benefits are largely anecdotal and require further scientific study. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties.
